vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #41

plan.title: Add a compass heading centered on the temperature/time row

narratives.Description: Add a compass heading centered on the temperature/time row
narratives.Overview:
## Request
Add a **compass heading** in the **center** of the row that holds the temperature (left) and the time (right) on the ride screen. Use the **same font size, face, and color** as the temperature and time displays.

## Current layout
- `RideView.topBar` is an `HStack(alignment: .top)`: `WeatherBadgeView` (temperature, left) ŌåÆ `Spacer()` ŌåÆ `AppClockView` (time, right).
- Temperature and time both render at `.system(size: 32, weight: .semibold, design: .rounded)`, `monospacedDigit()`, in `palette.primaryColor`.

## Desired behavior
- Place a compass heading in the horizontal center of that row (e.g. balance with spacers on both sides: temperature | Spacer | heading | Spacer | time).
- Style it identically to the temperature/time: `.system(size: 32, weight: .semibold, design: .rounded)`, `monospacedDigit()`, `palette.primaryColor`.
- Display the heading as a cardinal direction plus degrees, e.g. `NE 045┬░` (final format TBD during build).

## Implementation notes
- Source the heading from CoreLocation. Two options to decide during build:
  - **Course over ground** (`CLLocation.course`) ŌĆö direction of travel; most meaningful while riding, but invalid when stationary.
  - **Magnetic/true heading** (`CLLocationManager.startUpdatingHeading` / `CLHeading`) ŌĆö works at standstill but reflects which way the phone points, which may not match travel direction on a bike.
- Likely a new lightweight `CompassHeadingView` mirroring `AppClockView`'s structure, fed by `LocationService`.
- Handle the no-fix / invalid-heading case (e.g. show a placeholder like `--┬░` rather than a jumpy value).

## Open questions
- Course-over-ground vs. device heading (or course while moving, heading when stopped)?
- Exact text format: `NE 045┬░`, `045┬░ NE`, or degrees only?
narratives.FunctionalRequirements:
FR-1: A compass heading MUST appear horizontally centered on the temperature/time row in RideView.topBar.
FR-2: It MUST use the same style as temperature/time: .system(size: 32, weight: .semibold, design: .rounded), monospacedDigit(), palette.primaryColor.
FR-3: It MUST update live as the rider changes direction.
FR-4: It MUST degrade gracefully (placeholder) when no valid heading/fix is available.
FR-5: It MUST display an 8-point cardinal/intercardinal label only (N, NE, E, SE, S, SW, W, NW) with no degrees.
narratives.Architecture: Add a CompassHeadingView mirroring AppClockView, fed by LocationService. Expose a heading value on LocationService (course over ground from CLLocation.course while moving; optionally CLHeading via startUpdatingHeading when stationary). Format as an 8-point cardinal/intercardinal label only (N, NE, E, SE, S, SW, W, NW) by mapping each ~45┬░ sector to its label ŌĆö no degrees shown. In RideView.topBar, balance the row as temperature | Spacer | heading | Spacer | time so the heading is centered.
narratives.TestingStrategy: Unit-test the degrees->cardinal label helper (sector boundaries around 0/45/90/.../315/360, wraparound near 360->N, and invalid/negative -> placeholder). Build + on-device check that the heading is centered, matches temp/time styling, updates while riding, and shows a placeholder when stationary/no fix.
narratives.OpenQuestions: [RESOLVED] Heading source: hybrid -- course-over-ground while moving above a small speed threshold, device heading (CLHeading) when stationary; validate via field testing. [RESOLVED] Format: 8-point cardinal/intercardinal label only (N, NE, E, SE, S, SW, W, NW), no degrees.

items.title: Centered compass heading matching temp/time style

narrative.Acceptance: Heading centered on the row, 32pt rounded primary, live updates, graceful placeholder.

references.title: Issue #41: Add a compass heading centered on the temperature/time row
